raw_response_text:
<features>
- main object shape: elongated, horizontal
- main object location: centered, occupying the middle and upper-middle part of the image
- background: sky and water
- texture: smooth, blurred
- colors: dark grey/black for the hull, lighter grey/white for the superstructure, blue for the sky, dark grey/green for the water
</features>
<kb>
- IF [main object is an animal with four legs AND/OR main object has a distinct head and body of an animal] THEN [7]
- IF [main object is a vessel on water AND/OR main object has a hull and superstructure typical of a boat or ship] THEN [8]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 8 fires because the query image clearly shows an elongated object on water, with visible features resembling a hull and superstructure, consistent with a boat or ship.
</rule_check>
<response>8</response>

- main subject: animal with four legs
- body color: predominantly brown/reddish-brown
- leg markings: white markings on lower legs
- background: dark, indistinct
</features>

- IF [main subject is an animal with four legs AND/OR main subject has a brown/reddish-brown body] THEN [7]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 7 fires because the query image clearly shows an animal with four legs and a predominantly brown/reddish-brown body, which are consistent with the features observed in the examples for class 7.
</rule_check>
<response>7</response>
